ham.subject: Out of Office: [Name] - Back on 15 Aug 2024
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am currently out of the office and will return on 15 August 2024. I will have limited access to email. For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Priya Sharma at priya.sharma@example.com or call +91-9876543210.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
[Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx Shipment Missed Delivery – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We regret to inform you that your FedEx package with reference number 123456789 was not delivered on the scheduled date. As per FedEx policy, a missed delivery fee of ₹200 has been applied. To avoid further charges, please confirm your delivery address and pay the fee within 24 hours.

Click <URL> to verify and pay. This is a time‑sensitive notice. Failure to comply will result in cancellation of the shipment.

Kripya apna address confirm kare aur payment karen.

Thank you.

Regards,
FedEx Customer Support
